questions.question: What is the truth value of the statement: p ∧ (q ∨ ¬r) when p is True, q is False, and r is True?
questions.hint: Use the definitions of ∧ and ∨ to evaluate the expression.

questions.question: Complete the truth table for the statement: p → (q ∧ r), where p, q, and r are propositional variables.
questions.hint: Show all possible combinations of truth values for p, q, and r.

questions.question: Given the statement: (p ∧ q) ∨ (¬p ∧ r), simplify the expression using the laws of logic.
questions.hint: Use the laws of logic, such as the distributive law and the law of non-contradiction.
